description_long: This car is a stylized hot rod with a classic coupe body, featuring a vibrant paint job with blue, purple, and fiery red flames along the sides. The vehicle has a prominent, exposed engine block at the front, complete with visible exhaust pipes and mechanical details. Its roof is a matte green, contrasting with the metallic blue and silver hues of the body. The wheels are oversized and rugged, with thick treads and metallic rims, giving the car a powerful, aggressive stance. The windows are tinted blue, and the front grille is vertically slatted, adding to the vintage aesthetic. The overall design suggests a custom-built, high-performance car intended for show or street racing.
description: A custom hot rod coupe with a flame-painted body, exposed engine, and oversized rugged wheels. The car features a green roof, blue-tinted windows, and a bold, vintage design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the exposed engine, vertical grille, and large front wheels with thick treads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the flame paintwork, green roof, and the full profile of the exposed engine and exhaust pipes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blue-tinted rear window, green roof, and the wide stance of the rear wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showcasing the flame graphics, engine, and overall coupe shape.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights, separated, classic style
